title: phyllanthus petraeus
intro: Phyllanthus petraeus, also known as the stonecalm plant, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus petraeus include its potential to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Phyllanthus petraeus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
